mapper.select:
/* PtnrPrmtMapper.ptnrPrmtList */ SELECT PRMT.PARTNER_ID AS PTNR_ID , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0243',PRMT.PARTNER_ID) AS PTNR_NM , PRMT.PRMT_ID , PRMT.PRMT_NM , RAT.RATE_CD , RAT.RATE_NM
, PRMT.POINT_VAL
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PRMT.STRT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STRT_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PRMT.END_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE , PRMT.PRVD_CYCL
, FN_GET_USRNM(PRMT.RVISN_ID) AS USR_NM
, PRMT.ORGN_ID , F_GET_AGENT_NM(PRMT.ORGN_ID) AS ORGN_NM , PRMT.USIM_ORGN_ID , F_GET_AGENT_NM(PRMT.USIM_ORGN_ID) AS USIM_ORGN_NM , PRMT.ON_OFF_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007',PRMT.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM
FROM MSP_PARTNER_PRMT_MST PRMT , MSP_RATE_MST RAT WHERE RAT.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND RAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND PRMT.RATE_CD = RAT.RATE_CD AND #{stdrDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} BETWEEN PRMT.STRT_DATE AND PRMT.END_DATE
AND PRMT.PARTNER_ID = #{ptnrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND PRMT.PRMT_NM LIKE '%'||#{prmtNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
AND RAT.RATE_NM LIKE '%'||#{rateNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
ORDER BY PTNR_NM, RAT.RATE_NM, PRMT.STRT_DATE DESC, END_DATE DESC

/* PtnrPrmtMapper.ptnrPrmtListEx */ SELECT PRMT.PARTNER_ID AS PTNR_ID , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0243',PRMT.PARTNER_ID) AS PTNR_NM , PRMT.PRMT_ID , PRMT.PRMT_NM , RAT.RATE_CD , RAT.RATE_NM
, PRMT.POINT_VAL
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PRMT.STRT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STRT_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PRMT.END_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE , PRMT.PRVD_CYCL || '개월' AS PRVD_CYCL
, FN_GET_USRNM(PRMT.RVISN_ID) AS USR_NM
, PRMT.ORGN_ID , F_GET_AGENT_NM(PRMT.ORGN_ID) AS ORGN_NM , PRMT.USIM_ORGN_ID , F_GET_AGENT_NM(PRMT.USIM_ORGN_ID) AS USIM_ORGN_NM , PRMT.ON_OFF_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007',PRMT.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM
FROM MSP_PARTNER_PRMT_MST PRMT , MSP_RATE_MST RAT WHERE RAT.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND RAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND PRMT.RATE_CD = RAT.RATE_CD AND #{stdrDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} BETWEEN PRMT.STRT_DATE AND PRMT.END_DATE
AND PRMT.PARTNER_ID = #{ptnrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND PRMT.PRMT_NM LIKE '%'||#{prmtNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
AND RAT.RATE_NM LIKE '%'||#{rateNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
ORDER BY PTNR_NM, RAT.RATE_NM, PRMT.STRT_DATE DESC, END_DATE DESC
